tool.name: start_oob_listener
tool.description:
Start interactsh-client session — generates unique callback domain like c0f5jn.oast.fun.
Embed in blind SSRF/XXE/SQLi/SSTI/RCE payloads to confirm the target actually reached out. Call poll_oob_interactions to see which payloads triggered.

parameter.name: server
parameter.description: oast.fun / oast.online / oast.me / interact.sh. Default oast.fun.

tool.name: poll_oob_interactions
tool.description: Poll for callbacks on an OOB listener session. Returns protocol (DNS/HTTP/SMTP), source IP, timestamp, raw request preview.

tool.name: stop_oob_listener
tool.description: Stop interactsh-client session, return total callbacks seen.
